parsed_output.justification: James is the most suspicious player due to his highly contradictory claims; he first claims to be the Seer (Line 93) and later claims he was a Werewolf (Line 206). He then attempts to frame Elliot by claiming that Elliot, as the Robber, swapped cards with him, making Elliot the Werewolf. This erratic behavior and blatant contradiction suggest that James is either the Werewolf attempting to manipulate the group or the Tanner, but given the goal to eliminate a Werewolf, James is the most logical target based on the public discussion.
